text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer? I'm sorry, did I give you a fright?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
My parents run a boxing gym, you see. If I ever
need to concentrate, there's nothing more
effective than this.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Say, Trainer, if you'd be up for it, how
about being my partner for some mitt work?
